---
# title: |
#   ![](bg4.jpg){width=1in}  
#   Adding a Logo to LaTeX Title
site: bookdown
# output: 
#   html_document:
#     css: "assets/css/CSSBackground.css"
---

<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>

# {.tabset .tabpills}

**Be one of the first to skate our boards!**

```{r setup, include=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
# knitr::include_graphics("assets/imgs/bg4.jpg")
```


```{css echo = FALSE}
body {
  background-image: url(bg4.jpg);
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-size: 100%;
}

div {
  background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35)   /* 35% opaque white */;
  padding: 0.25em;
}

h1, h2, h3 {
  text-align: center;
}

```

```{r child = "preorder.Rmd"}

```


```{r child = "contact.Rmd"}

```


```{r child = "README.md"}

```
